Hearing On Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP.
Ruth Bradley, Anthony Bradley, Jr. and Nancy Mae Clinton, wrongful death heirs, were present, placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying personal injury - survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Ruth Bradley, as Wrongful Death Heir - 100%
Anthony Bradley, Jr., as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Nancy Mae Clinton, as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Marie Robinson, as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover the sum of $1,028.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $5,065.00. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of ruth Bradley shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Zoya Yarnykh, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, 415-898-1555 for plaintiffs and moving parties RUTH BRADLEY, ANTHONY BRADLEY, NANCY CLINTON, MARIE ROBINSON

MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF RUTH BRADLEY, ANTHONY BRADLEY, NANCY CLINTON, MARIE ROBINSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Jacqueline Chan, CSR# 10276 (301/PJB)
